Rimini Street to Report Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results on July 31, 2025 LAS VEGAS, July 09, 2025--Rimini Street, Inc. (Nasdaq: RMNI), a global provider of end-to-end enterprise software support, management and innovation solutions, and the leading third-party support provider for Oracle, SAP and VMware software, today announced it will report earnings after market close on July 31, 2025.
